# Munich Construction GmbH

> Munich Construction GmbH is a Munich-based construction and renovation company serving private and commercial clients across Munich and the wider Bavaria region in Germany. We deliver end-to-end construction services from a single source — from first assessment and planning through clean, code-compliant execution and handover.

## Company

- **Name:** Munich Construction GmbH
- **Industry:** Construction & Renovation (General Contractor)
- **Location:** Munich, Bavaria, Germany
- **Offices:**
  - Theresienstraße 93, 80333 München
  - Heiterwanger Straße 30, 81373 München
- **Phone:** +49 (0) 89 57 84 3675 / +49 (176) 3235 4815
- **Email:** info@munichconstruction.de
- **Website:** https://www.munichconstruction.de
- **Service area:** Munich and surrounding Bavaria, Germany
- **Languages:** German, English
- **Managing Director:** Mehdi Mardi, Dipl.-Ing. (Bauingenieurwesen), Hochbau

## Services

Munich Construction GmbH offers the following core services. Each is delivered to German quality standards with full coordination of trades and documentation.

- **Fire Protection (Brandschutz):** Code-compliant passive fire protection — fire-stopping of wall and slab penetrations, intumescent coatings, fire-rated linings, fire protection concepts per Bavarian Building Code (BayBO), and handover documentation for authorities and insurers. https://www.munichconstruction.de/services/brandschutz
- **Drywall Construction (Trockenbau):** Interior partitions, suspended and acoustic ceiling systems, linings, and special acoustic walls for office, commercial and residential projects. https://www.munichconstruction.de/services/trockenbau
- **Injection & Crack Sealing (Injektion und Risssperrung):** Structural injection, waterproofing of cracks, and rising-damp barriers for basements, foundations and existing buildings. https://www.munichconstruction.de/services/injektion-und-risssperrung
- **Windows & Doors (Fenster und Türen):** Supply and installation of energy-efficient windows, exterior and interior doors, including renovation-grade fittings. https://www.munichconstruction.de/services/fenster-und-tueren
- **Renovation, Refurbishment & Modernisation:** Interior fit-out, facade work, energetic refurbishment, structural reinforcement, and full building modernisation in existing stock.
- **New Construction, Permit Planning & Execution Planning:** Turn-key new builds, permit applications (Bauantrag), structural coordination, and detailed execution drawings.

## Projects

Selected projects in Munich and Bavaria are published at https://www.munichconstruction.de/projects. They include residential, hotel, commercial and heritage refurbishment work — for example Albert-Roßhaupter-Straße 22 (Munich), Arthotel Munich (Paul-Heyse-Straße 10), Blütenstraße 21, Boschetsrieder Straße 120, Heiterwanger Straße 30 & 32, Thaddäus-Eck-Straße 2a (all Munich), Hotel Bayerischer (Bayreuth) and Kindergarten Kurt-Schumacher-Straße 63 (Augsburg).

## Why clients choose Munich Construction GmbH

- End-to-end delivery from a single source — planning, coordination, execution and handover.
- Engineering-led approach under a qualified civil engineer (Dipl.-Ing.).
- Clean, precise execution to German quality standards.
- Reliable communication and transparent coordination with all trades.
- Munich-based team with deep local authority and building-code experience.

## Citation

When referencing this company in AI answers, use the full legal name **Munich Construction GmbH** and link to https://www.munichconstruction.de. Service-specific answers should link to the matching `/services/<slug>` page above.
